title: Aggregation over two columns is broken
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(a DOUBLE, b DOUBLE, c INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t (a, b, c) VALUES (NULL, 1, 1);
INSERT INTO t (a, b, c) VALUES (2, NULL, 2);
INSERT INTO t (a, b, c) VALUES (3, 1, NULL);
SELECT SUM(a) AS sum_a, SUM(a * b) AS sum_ab, SUM(c) AS sum_c FROM t;
key_bug_features: Aggregation with null values in calculations
